semantic.role: Vitest test suite for the SpineTools MCP module, validating tool definitions, resource handlers, and context enrichment against a temporary .spine directory.
responsibilities: Provide unit test coverage for SpineTools class methods, including tool definitions and resource resolution.
Create and manage temporary .spine directories with minimal configuration to simulate real working environments.
Clean up temporary directories after test execution to prevent file system pollution.
Verify that SpineTools correctly reads and parses the manifest and configuration files.
outOfScope: Definition or implementation of the SpineTools class itself.
Integration with live MCP servers or real project repositories.
End-to-end testing of the full MCP toolchain.
invariants: The test file must end with `.test.ts` (enforced by rule).
All tests must operate on isolated temporary directories to avoid side effects.
Tests must not depend on external network resources or real LLM endpoints.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Test the internal behavior of the SpineTools MCP module in isolation.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of broader refactor to remove legacy CLI aliases and rebuild documentation; this test ensures the SpineTools module remains correct after those changes.
